They explore the changing nature of the cybersecurity landscape, from securing AI agent identities to zero-day attacks enabled by AI coding agents.

Garabedian joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Sam Fazeli on this episode of the Vanguards of Health Care podcast to explain why he earlier left the track of operating public companies to back biotech, where better decisions can create the biggest value inflections. He discusses what separates real drug developers from scientists, why early biotech mista

summary: Gas-turbine and energy-equipment maker Siemens Energy AG raised its outlook for the fiscal year 2026, citing strong demand.

title: Oil Trader Andurand Lost 52% in April First Half on Oil Bets
title_cn: 石油交易商 Andurand 4 月上半月因石油押注损失 52%
summary: Energy trader Pierre Andurand’s largest hedge fund plunged about 52% in the first half of April, wiping out first quarter gains made on bullish oil bets at the start of the Iran war.

title: US Stocks Waver on Mixed Earnings and US-Iran Impasse
title_cn: 美国股市因盈利好坏和美伊僵局而波动
summary: US stocks swung between narrow gains and losses on Thursday after Israel said it was poised to resume the war with Iran, while the impasse between Washington and Tehran continued.

title: Pimco Privately Lends $10 Billion to Gulf in Wartime Deals
title_cn: Pimco 通过战时交易向海湾地区私下提供 100 亿美元贷款
summary: As Persian Gulf states build cash buffers to deal with any potential economic fallout from the Iran war, one large buyer has stepped in: Pacific Investment Management Co.

title: Sheinbaum Points to Local Officials After CIA Agent Deaths
title_cn: 中央情报局特工死亡后，辛鲍姆将矛头指向当地官员
summary: Mexico’s President Claudia Sheinbaum sought to ease tensions with the US after the death of CIA agents following a recent drug lab bust in northern Mexico, blaming an opposition state government for failing to adhere to proper security protocols.

title: Rogers’ Spending Cut Plan Prompts Two Analysts to Boost Ratings
title_cn: 罗杰斯的支出削减计划促使两名分析师提高评级
summary: Rogers Communications Inc.’s decision to pull back on capital spending and boost free cash flow this year prompted at least two analysts to raise their recommendation on the telecommunications firm after the company released its first-quarter results Wednesday.

title: Dow CEO Says Petrochemical Supply Disruptions to Persist in 2026
title_cn: 陶氏化学首席执行官表示石化供应中断将在 2026 年持续存在
summary: Dow Inc., one of the world’s largest producers of petrochemicals, expects supply disruptions tied to the war in Iran to persist throughout the remainder of 2026, according to Chief Executive Officer Jim Fitterling.

title: Uruguay Finance Chief Says Pensions Will Stay in Private Hands
title_cn: 乌拉圭财政部长表示养老金将留在私人手中
summary: Uruguay’s pension savings will continue to be managed by the private sector under the government’s planned overhaul of the social security system, Finance Minister Gabriel Oddone said.

title: Treasuries Headed for Tightest Monthly Trading Range Since 2020
title_cn: 美国国债将迎来 2020 年以来最窄的月度交易区间
summary: US Treasury benchmark yields have been locked in the narrowest range since the depths of the coronavirus pandemic, as investors fatigued by conflicting geopolitical headlines search for direction.

title: Oil Climbs on Hormuz Standoff as Stocks Fluctuate: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着股市波动，霍尔木兹僵局导致石油价格上涨：市场结束
summary: A flare-up in tensions over the Strait of Hormuz sent oil higher as stocks fluctuated on concern that a prolonged closure of the waterway could worsen energy disruptions, boosting inflation and slowing the economy.

title: Oil Fluctuates as Tanker Voyages Via Hormuz Face Fresh Risks
title_cn: 经由霍尔木兹的油轮航行面临新的风险，石油价格波动
summary: Oil swung between gains and losses as the US and Iran remained locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz, after plans to meet for a fresh round of peace talks failed.

title: Modi Seeks to Win Key India State After Voter Rolls Purged
title_cn: 选民名册被清洗后，莫迪寻求赢得印度关键邦
summary: Just two weeks before voters in India’s eastern state of West Bengal were due to go to the polls, about 9 million names were removed from the registered roll, causing an uproar among opposition groups.

title: CAAT Pension Earns 8.4% as Stock Gains Outweigh Weak PE Returns
title_cn: CAAT Pension 盈利 8.4%，股票上涨超过 PE 回报疲弱
summary: CAAT Pension Plan earned 8.4% last year as buoyant stock performance outweighed soft returns in the fund’s private market portfolio.

title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Hormuz Standoff Heightens Inflation Risk
title_cn: 美国与伊朗霍尔木兹海峡对峙加剧通胀风险，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as an escalation in tension over the Strait of Hormuz drove oil prices higher, rekindling concerns over high inflation.

title: The WNBA's Expansion into Cleveland is Powered by PE
title_cn: PE 为 WNBA 向克利夫兰扩张提供动力
summary: In this episode of The Deal, Kara Nortman breaks down for Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly how Monarch, her private equity firm, became the first PE firm approved to invest in the WNBA and why they chose Cleveland as their team (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 4/23/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Avis Shares Plunge 62% in Two Days in Crashing Halt to Rally
title_cn: 安飞士股价两天内暴跌 62%
summary: A searing surge in the shares of Avis Budget Group Inc. has hit a wall, with the stock plunging over 62% in just two days.

title: Czech Utility Giant CEZ Plans Asset Split Before Possible Buyout
title_cn: 捷克公用事业巨头CEZ计划在可能的收购之前进行资产分割
summary: Czech power utility CEZ AS outlined a plan to split its assets, a move that could pave the way for the government to obtain full ownership of its electricity production in a long-planned buyout.

title: Why EV Demand Is Stronger Than It Looks
title_cn: 为什么电动汽车需求比看起来更强劲
summary: Tesla is tripling AI spending to $25B as its robotics ambitions ramp up, while EV sales send mixed signals. TD Cowen’s Itay Michaeli joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why demand may be stronger than it looks, why losing tax credits hurt more than high gas prices helped, and how upcoming EV launches could spark the next surge. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Mountain Raises $2.4 Billion to Hold Azuria Water Longer
title_cn: New Mountain 筹集 24 亿美元以延长 Azuria 水的保存时间
summary: New Mountain Capital collected $2.4 billion to extend its hold on infrastructure firm Azuria Water Solutions, underscoring the booming market for secondhand private equity stakes.

title: American Express Sees Strong Card Spending, Higher Costs
title_cn: 美国运通卡消费强劲，成本上升
summary: American Express Co. plans to boost spending on marketing and technology and said its customers’ spending on air travel has been slowing. Romaine Bostick discusses his interview with American Express CEO Stephen Squeri on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly | Season 4A Trailer
title_cn: 与亚历克斯·罗德里格斯和杰森·凯利的交易|第 4A 季预告片
summary: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly showcases intimate conversations with business titans and sports champions that reveal their investment philosophies, missed opportunities and more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Keurig Dr Pepper Results Lifted by Demand for Cold Beverages
title_cn: Keurig Dr Pepper 业绩因冷饮需求而提升
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc.’s strong sales of soda and energy drinks helped boost its first-quarter results above expectations Thursday.

title: Blackstone Sees ‘Best Year’ for Its IPOs as Earnings Beat
title_cn: 随着盈利增长，黑石集团将其 IPO 视为“最好的一年”
summary: Blackstone Inc. reported a larger-than-expected jump in distributable earnings, boosted by a robust start to dealmaking before the war in Iran rattled investors. With US markets rising and AI ventures preparing to go public, President Jon Gray predicted the firm’s “best year ever” for stock listings.

title: Hasbro Preliminary Sales Beat Estimates, Buoyed by ‘Magic’
title_cn: 孩之宝初步销售额超出预期，受到“魔法”的提振
summary: Hasbro Inc. reported preliminary revenue that beat analysts’ estimates, buoyed by its fantasy card game Magic: The Gathering. The toy company said it couldn’t release full quarterly results at this time due to a previously disclosed cybersecurity attack.

title: Teck Warns of Higher Fuel Costs From Mideast Energy Shock
title_cn: 泰克警告中东能源危机导致燃料成本上涨
summary: Canada’s Teck Resources Ltd. warned of higher fuel costs for its key Chilean copper mines as the war in the Middle East chokes supply chains, even as higher commodity prices buoyed the company’s earnings in the first quarter.

title: AI Junk-Bond Binge Brings Rare Early Repayments to Sweeten Deals
title_cn: 人工智能垃圾债券狂潮带来罕见的提前还款，让交易更加甜蜜
summary: As a more than $20 billion borrowing frenzy to build out data centers descended on the junk-bond market this year, some issuers offered up a rare sweetener: an early cash payback.

title: American Airlines Lowers Outlook on Rising Fuel Costs
title_cn: 美国航空下调燃油成本上涨预期
summary: American Airlines announced it expects $4 billion in additional expenses due to rising jet fuel prices but plans to raise fares to offset these costs, maintaining some of the price increases even if fuel prices return to prewar levels. Siddharth Philip has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: American Airlines Lowers Guidance Due to Rising Fuel Prices
title_cn: 美国航空因燃油价格上涨而下调指引
summary: Higher fuel prices due to the war in Iran are weighing on American Airlines. The carrier lowered its full-year earnings target even after beating on earnings for the quarter. Bloomberg's Siddharth Phillip reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Ingenico Starts Talks With Lenders on ‘Untenable’ Debt
title_cn: Apollo 的 Ingenico 开始与贷方就“无法承担”的债务进行谈判
summary: French payments firm Ingenico, backed by Apollo Global Management, has started debt talks with creditors as it struggles to keep up with its interest bill.

title: US Seeks to Halt US AI Model ‘Exploitation’ by Chinese Rivals
title_cn: 美国寻求阻止中国竞争对手“利用”美国人工智能模型
summary: The Trump administration unveiled measures aimed at preventing Chinese developers from improperly using leading American AI models to build a rival generation of chatbots, marking the first major US response to Silicon Valley companies’ complaints that China is piggybacking on their success.

title: Key Takeaways on Complaints Inside Alex Cooper’s Podcast Empire
title_cn: 亚历克斯·库珀播客帝国内部投诉的主要要点
summary: The host of Call Her Daddy has been grappling with multiple challenges inside her business, some of them brought about by her husband.

title: Lyft to Acquire London Black Cab App Gett
title_cn: Lyft 将收购 London Black Cab App Gett
summary: Lyft has agreed to buy Gett, an app used for requesting black cabs in London. Lyft CEO David Risher says international growth and expansion into capital-light businesses like Gett are key to growing the rideshare company. Risher joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Offers Buyouts to About 7% of US Workers
title_cn: 微软向约 7% 的美国员工提供买断
summary: Microsoft Corp. is offering voluntary retirement to thousands of its employees in the US.

title: Texas Instruments Climbs the Most Since 2001 on Upbeat Forecast
title_cn: 德州仪器 (TI) 因乐观预测股价上涨 2001 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Texas Instruments Inc. shares jumped the most in more than two decades after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: AI Is Central to ServiceNow Platform, CEO McDermott Says
title_cn: 首席执行官 McDermott 表示，人工智能是 ServiceNow 平台的核心
summary: "We are a growth company," ServiceNow Chair and CEO Bill McDermott says while discussing the company's first-quarter earnings on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google’s Liz Reid on How to Improve Your Search Results
title_cn: Google 的 Liz Reid 讲述如何改善搜索结果
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Google's Elizabeth Reid joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss search in the world of AI. As vice president of search, Reid tells us about how AI is changing user behavior and how Google is incorporating Gemini into search. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Too Tipsy to Drive? German Suppliers Have In-Car Sensor for That
title_cn: 醉得不敢开车？德国供应商为此提供了车载传感器
summary: Volkswagen AG, Stellantis NV and Mercedes-Benz Group AG models may soon feature touchscreens able to test blood alcohol levels for drivers.

title: AI Build-Out Is a Huge Driver, Blackstone's Gray Says
title_cn: Blackstone 的 Gray 表示，人工智能的发展是一个巨大的推动力
summary: Blackstone Inc. President Jon Gray said the build-out of artificial-intelligence infrastructure is the single-biggest driver for the company right now. He speaks to Dani Burger. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Push to Unwind Bitcoin Hoarder Shows Once-Hot Trade Failing
title_cn: 推动比特币囤积者平仓表明一度热门的交易失败
summary: Shareholders in a UK Bitcoin accumulator are pushing it to sell all its tokens and wind down operations, one of the most dramatic examples of how the once-hot trade has fallen out of favor.

title: Infosys Sales Forecast Trails Estimates as IT Demand Sputters
title_cn: IT 需求下滑，Infosys 销售预测低于预期
summary: Infosys Ltd. forecast sales growth for this year below analysts’ estimates, as global enterprises curtail spending on large information technology projects to prepare for geopolitical and economic challenges.

title: IBM Fails to Shake AI Concerns With Software Sales; Shares Drop
title_cn: IBM 未能通过软件销售消除人工智能担忧；股价下跌
summary: International Business Machines Corp. posted quarterly sales in its software unit that were in line with estimates, failing to shake investor concerns about AI disruption to its business.

title: Comcast Profit Beats Estimates With Fewer Broadband Losses
title_cn: 康卡斯特利润超出预期，宽带损失减少
summary: Comcast Corp. reported first-quarter financial results that exceeded analysts’ estimates with fewer losses among broadband customers, offsetting lackluster growth at its Peacock streaming service.

title: ServiceNow Falls After Reporting Sales Slowed by Mideast War
title_cn: ServiceNow 报告销售额因中东战争而放缓
summary: ServiceNow Inc. shares plunged by the most in six years after the provider of software for business tasks reported results that disappointed investors and said some sales deals have been delayed by the war in the Middle East.

title: Eoptolink’s Profit Surges on Brisk Demand for AI Components
title_cn: AI组件需求旺盛 新易盛利润大幅增长
summary: Eoptolink Technology Inc. posted record annual profit and a surge in first-quarter earnings, as demand rises for optical components critical to artificial intelligence development.

title: Intel’s $240 Billion Rally Slams Into a Potential Earnings Wall
title_cn: 英特尔 2400 亿美元的涨势撞上了潜在的盈利墙
summary: Intel Corp. has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past 12 months, soaring more than 240% to the highest price since the dot-com bubble. But the rally is facing a potential roadblock in the company’s first-quarter earnings report due after the close Thursday.

title: Google Faces EU Pressure to Open Up Android to Gemini Rivals
title_cn: 谷歌面临欧盟向 Gemini 竞争对手开放 Android 的压力
summary: Google faces ramped up European Union pressure to lift barriers to rival AI search assistants on Android handsets in an escalation that the US giant fears could compromise users’ security and privacy.

title: UK Health Data Listed for Sale on China’s Alibaba After Breach
title_cn: 违规后英国健康数据在中国阿里巴巴上出售
summary: Health records from 500,000 people who are participating in British research into aging and diseases were made available for sale on an Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. website.

title: Musk Offers Amends for Teslas Lacking the Ability to Self-Drive
title_cn: 马斯克为特斯拉缺乏自动驾驶能力提供了补救措施
summary: Countless Tesla Inc. customers who paid thousands of dollars for autonomous-driving capability lack the necessary hardware in their vehicles, leading Elon Musk to outline options for redress that likely will be costly for the company.

title: Lyft to Buy Gett’s UK Taxi Business, Marking Its Third International Acquisition
title_cn: Lyft 将收购 Gett 的英国出租车业务，这是其第三次国际收购
summary: Lyft Inc. has agreed to buy London black cab app Gett, its third acquisition in the past year, as the company works to expand its presence beyond the US.

title: The David Rubenstein Show: Nik Storonsky
title_cn: 大卫·鲁宾斯坦秀：尼克·斯托伦斯基
summary:
Nik Storonsky, CEO of Revolut, built one of the world's most valuable fintech companies -- now worth around $75 billion. In this interview, he explains how a simple idea -- eliminating hidden foreign exchange fees -- turned Revolut into a global digital bank offering payments, trading, crypto, and business banking in one app.
In this episode of The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations, Storonsky discusses Revolut’s growth, the future of fintech, plans for US expansion, and whether an IPO is coming. This interview was recorded April 14 at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg Center in Washington DC.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Child Safety Officers Need Bigger Budgets to Protect Kids From Online Abuse
title_cn: 儿童安全官员需要更多预算来保护儿童免受网络虐待
summary: Easier-to-use AI tools have sparked an increase in abusive imagery

title: How the Murder of Bob Lee Fueled Tech’s Rightward Swing
title_cn: 鲍勃·李的谋杀如何助长了科技业的右倾
summary: The 2023 murder of a tech executive seemed to fit neatly into narratives about street crime in liberal cities, until it didn’t.

title: Netflix Buying Back $25 Billion in Stock After Share Decline
title_cn: Netflix 股价下跌后回购 250 亿美元股票
summary: Netflix Inc. plans to buy back another $25 billion in stock after a disappointing financial outlook sent shares of the streaming pioneer plunging.

title: Sri Lanka Probes $2.5 Million Hack of Finance Ministry Funds
title_cn: 斯里兰卡调查财政部资金 250 万美元遭黑客攻击
summary: Sri Lanka is probing the theft of $2.5 million by hackers who breached the Finance Ministry’s computer systems, Treasury Secretary Harshana Suriyapperuma said on Thursday.

title: Tencent Unveils AI Model in High-Stakes Test for OpenAI Hire
title_cn: 腾讯在 OpenAI Hire 高风险测试中推出 AI 模型
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. revealed a major upgrade to its foundational model, marking the first high-stakes test for China’s most valuable company to assert its place in a frenetic AI race since it recruited a top researcher from OpenAI.

title: Foundering: A Brilliant Programmer and a Lot of Wild Living
title_cn: 创始人：一位才华横溢的程序员和许多狂野的生活
summary: After his murder, Bob Lee’s friends and family felt that his story was obscured by waves of headlines, rumors, and misinformation, first about street crime in San Francisco, then about the debaucherous lifestyle of the city's elite.

title: Norway $2.2 Trillion Fund Lost 1.9% Led by Tech Stocks Slide
title_cn: 科技股下滑导致挪威 2.2 万亿美元基金下跌 1.9%
summary: Norway’s wealth fund lost 1.9% in the first quarter, dragged down by investments in US technology stocks as the war in the Middle East rattled markets.

title: Victory Giant Surges in Debut After Biggest Hong Kong Listing This Year
title_cn: 胜利巨人今年最大的香港上市后首次亮相
summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co., a Chinese supplier of Nvidia Corp., surged 50% in its Hong Kong trading debut after raising $2.6 billion in the city’s largest listing in seven months.

title: TSMC Says ASML’s Latest Chipmaking Gear Is Too Pricey to Use
title_cn: 台积电表示 ASML 最新的芯片制造设备太贵而无法使用
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. will hold off on deploying ASML Holding NV’s most cutting-edge lithography machines for chip production through 2029 to save money, dealing a potential setback to the Dutch maker of the costly equipment.

title: US Oil CEOs Meet Venezuela President as Trump Seeks Oil Revival
title_cn: 特朗普寻求石油复兴，美国石油公司首席执行官会见委内瑞拉总统
summary: A group of US oil executives met Venezuela’s president in Caracas last week and pressed for assurances the nation was safe to invest in as the Trump administration urges them to rebuild its beleaguered energy sector.

title: Trump ‘Gold Card’ Visa Granted to Only One Person So Far, Lutnick Says
title_cn: 卢特尼克表示，到目前为止，特朗普“金卡”签证仅授予一人
summary: Only one person has been approved so far for Donald Trump’s “Gold Card” Visa program granting foreigners US residency for a $1 million fee, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Thursday.

title: Estonia Calls for Ukraine’s Full EU Membership, ‘No Other Way’
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚呼吁乌克兰完全加入欧盟，“别无选择”
summary: Estonia’s prime minister said there’s no alternative to Ukraine’s full membership in the European Union as the bloc’s leaders gather to discuss closer ties with the war-battered nation.

title: Carney Says Booze Bans Can Be Resolved ‘Quickly’ With US Action
title_cn: 卡尼表示，美国的行动可以“迅速”解决禁酒令
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says provincial liquor store bans on US alcohol can be resolved “quickly” if the Trump administration takes steps of its own to settle trade disputes.

title: Billionaires’ Row Towers Are Flashpoint for New NYC Tax on Rich
title_cn: 亿万富翁的排塔是纽约市新富人税的爆发点
summary: When Mayor Zohran Mamdani declared a new tax was coming for wealthy property owners in New York City, he wanted to make clear it was “designed for the richest of the rich.”

title: ECB’s Nagel Says Trump’s Fed Attacks Caused Flight to Safety
title_cn: 欧洲央行内格尔表示，特朗普的美联储攻击导致人们逃往安全地带
summary: President Donald Trump’s repeated attacks on the Federal Reserve are backfiring as they cause distrust in US institutions and a flight from US assets and the dollar, European Central Bank Governing Council member Joachim Nagel said.

title: US-Iran Tensions Build Over Hormuz in Absence of Peace Talks
title_cn: 在没有和谈的情况下，美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡上的紧张局势加剧
summary: US and Iran tensions grew over the Strait of Hormuz with both sides maintaining their blockades of the critical waterway, creating an uneasy standoff with no sign of peace talks on the horizon.

title: Ramaphosa Suspends Police Chief Implicated in Irregular Tender
title_cn: 拉马福萨停职涉嫌违规招标的警察局长
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa suspended the nation’s police chief, days after he appeared in court in connection with an allegedly fraudulent procurement tender.

title: US Boards Supertanker Carrying Oil From Iran in Indian Ocean
title_cn: 美国登上在印度洋运送伊朗石油的超级油轮
summary: US forces boarded a supertanker carrying Iranian oil in the Indian Ocean as the navy steps up its blockade of the Islamic Republic’s shipping.

title: Top Party Withdrawal Leaves Romania With Minority Government
title_cn: 最高政党退出，罗马尼亚只剩下少数政府
summary: Romania will rely on a minority government to push through reforms needed to secure billions of euros in European Union funds after the largest party in the coalition quit in a dispute over unpopular austerity measures.

title: EU Finalizes Deal to Pay Out €90 Billion Loan to Ukraine
title_cn: 欧盟敲定向乌克兰提供 900 亿欧元贷款的协议
summary: The European Union has given final approval to pay out its €90 billion ($106 billion) loan to Ukraine, bringing much-needed relief to the war-torn country.

title: Trump Tells Navy to Shoot Any Boats Laying Mines in Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普要求海军射击任何在霍尔木兹海峡埋雷的船只
summary: Tensions are growing in the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump ordered the US Navy to shoot any boat that are laying mines in the critical waterway, while the military said it intercepted two oil supertankers trying to evade its blockade. Tyler Kendall is covering the latest developments from Washington. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chile’s Key Bill Set to Cut Revenue Regardless of Growth
title_cn: 智利的关键法案将削减收入，无论增长如何
summary: Chile’s new government sent its flagship economic bill to Congress Wednesday, with the budget office forecasting it would erode public finances throughout the administration’s four years in office.

title: US Labels State-Licensed Marijuana as Less Dangerous Drug
title_cn: 美国将国家许可的大麻标记为危险性较低的药物
summary: The US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that could dramatically increase legal cannabis sales in the coming years.

title: Ukraine Will Push for a Path to Full EU Membership at Summit
title_cn: 乌克兰将在峰会上寻求正式加入欧盟的道路
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said his country deserves “full-fledged” membership in the European Union, rejecting proposals for an alternative path that is faster but with fewer rights.

title: Hungary’s Outgoing Foreign Minister Has No Regret on Russia Ties
title_cn: 匈牙利即将离任的外交部长对俄罗斯关系并不后悔
summary: Hungarian outgoing foreign minister Peter Szijjarto, whose ties to Moscow triggered speculation about his allegiance during the election campaign, said he had no regrets about cultivating relations with Russia.

title: Trump Orders Navy to Shoot Boats Placing Mines in Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 特朗普命令海军射击在霍尔木兹海峡布设水雷的船只
summary: President Donald Trump ordered the US Navy to shoot any boat putting mines in the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to step up efforts to clear the critical energy waterway amid a standoff with Iran.

title: Shipping Through Hormuz Remains Largely Frozen After US Blockade
title_cn: 美国封锁后，通过霍尔木兹的运输仍然基本冻结
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains largely frozen, with only occasional movements of Iran-linked vessels breaking the lull.

title: Iran’s Exiled Crown Prince Splattered With Red Liquid in Berlin
title_cn: 伊朗流亡王储在柏林被泼红色液体
summary: Reza Pahlavi, Iran’s exiled former crown prince, was splashed with a red liquid during a visit in Berlin.

title: London Mayor Sadiq Khan on 10 Years of Wins and Losses
title_cn: 伦敦市长萨迪克·汗谈十年得失
summary: Sadiq Khan shares how he fought for environmental policies through a tumultuous decade as London’s mayor. He speaks with Bloomberg's Akshat Rathi. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dangote Agrees to Help Build Oil Refinery in East Africa
title_cn: 丹格特同意帮助东非建设炼油厂
summary: Kenyan President William Ruto said his government and neighboring Uganda’s are in talks with Africa’s richest man, Aliko Dangote, to build a crude oil refinery in Tanzania. Dangote said that the refinery would be "built within the next four or five years" if all sides agree on the project. Ruto and Dangote made the comments during a panel discussion at the We Build Africa Summit in Nairobi, moderated by Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dangote Vows to Build Nigeria-Style Oil Refinery in East Africa
title_cn: 丹格特誓言在东非建设尼日利亚式炼油厂
summary: Aliko Dangote, Africa’s richest man, pledged to help East African nations build a new oil refinery in Tanzania, as the war in Iran exposes the continent’s over-reliance on fuel imports from the Middle East.

title: IMF Says Talks With Lebanon on Financing Program Are Progressing
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示与黎巴嫩的融资计划谈判正在取得进展
summary: The International Monetary Fund said talks with Lebanon on a potential financial program are progressing, as the country grapples with the impact of Israel’s war against Hezbollah.

title: Xi Weaponizes Foreign Airspace in Latest Bid to Isolate Taiwan
title_cn: 习近平将外国空域武器化以孤立台湾
summary: President Xi Jinping has for years worked to isolate Taiwan’s leaders by blocking their diplomatic meetings and participation in global organizations. Now, he’s also looking to keep them out of the skies.

title: Senate Takes a Step Toward Ending 2-Month DHS Shutdown
title_cn: 参议院采取措施结束国土安全部两个月的关闭
summary: A 3 a.m. vote is a small sign of progress in Congress

title: Big Bet on Orban’s Exit Came From Center of His Family’s Empire
title_cn: 欧尔班退出的大赌注来自其家族帝国的中心
summary: An asset-management fund in the Equilor group of companies part-owned by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s son-in-law profited from financial-market bets on the strongman losing power.

title: Tanzania Says at Least 518 Died in Violence After 2025 Election
title_cn: 坦桑尼亚称 2025 年大选后至少 518 人死于暴力
summary: At least 518 people died in Tanzania’s post-election violence last year, according to the first official death toll released since the events in October.
